narrative:
Cols 53-B (precinct in Franklin County) has 638 registered voters, with 51.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 26.3%, a modest Democratic lean of 4.2 percentage points.
